name: gjsify
description: The full JavaScript ecosystem, native on GNOME

scripts.test:e2e: node --test tests/lint-engines.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/create-app/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-only/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-only-pnp/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/pnp-zip-static-reads/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/standalone-plugin/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/native-install/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-config/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-config-input/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/inline-static-reads/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/library-multi-build/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/gsettings/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/define-from-pkg/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/text-loader/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/css-bundling/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/dlx-native-prebuilds/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/dlx-version-pin/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cjs-require-stream/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/plugins-by-name/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/shebang-string/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/flatpak/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/self-host/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/native-install-project/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/workspace-install/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/foreach-command/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/run-command/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/install-immutable/run.mjs
scripts.npm:publish: yarn run build && yarn run build:examples && yarn workspaces foreach -v --all --no-private --exclude '@girs/*' npm publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public
scripts.build: yarn run build:infra && gjsify foreach build -tp --no-private --exclude '@girs/*' --exclude '@gjsify/example-*' --exclude '@gjsify/website' && yarn workspace @gjsify/cli run build:gjs-bundle
scripts.build:infra: yarn workspace @gjsify/vite-plugin-blueprint run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/vite-plugin-gettext run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-pnp run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-deepkit run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-gjsify run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/create-app run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/semver run build:types && yarn workspace @gjsify/npm-registry run build:types && yarn workspace @gjsify/tar run build:types && yarn workspace @gjsify/workspace run build:types && yarn workspace @gjsify/cli run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/utils run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/events run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/terminal-native run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/process run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/assert run build && yarn workspace @gjsify/unit run build

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
